provisions.title: 1 Citation commen­cement and ^interpre­tation
provisions.content: (1) These Regulations may be cited as the Companies (Accounts Requirements) (Audit) Regulations, 2004, and shall come into force on such date as the Minister may by notice in the Gazette , appoint. (2) In these Regulations “the Act” means the Companies Act, 2002. [Act No. 12 of 2002 ] .

provisions.title: Requirements
provisions.content: For the purposes of section 154(2) of the Act, the requirements with which a company’s balance sheet, profit and loss account and cash flow statement shall comply are such requirements as are prescribed from time to time by the National Board of Accountants and Auditors.
